summary: The diff implements all four requirements comprehensively. A LanguageContext provider (REQ-1) is created with localStorage persistence and English default. A language switcher is added to Header for both desktop and mobile layouts (REQ-2). A centralized translations file is created covering all components (REQ-3). All page-section components are updated to consume translations (REQ-4). Minor concerns: the translations file is truncated so completeness of all three languages for all components cannot be fully verified, and keyboard navigability of the switcher (aria-pressed is present but full keyboard nav is not confirmed). Overall implementation appears complete.
